routes.caveat: Literary spine orientation does not claim that literature alone drives history.
routes.what_changes_here: Homer becomes a civilizational memory system: heroic action is no longer just story, but a grammar of honor, violence, and inherited imagination.

routes.caveat: Literary spine orientation does not claim that literature alone drives history.
routes.what_changes_here: Virgil and Rome become the hinge between Homeric heroic memory and imperial destiny: inherited epic turns into a public grammar of duty, rule, and civilizational transmission.

routes.caveat: Literary spine orientation does not claim that literature alone drives history.
routes.what_changes_here: Dante turns inherited sacred order into navigable imaginative architecture, making the inner life of civilization visible as a structured journey.

routes.caveat: Literary spine orientation does not claim that literature alone drives history.
routes.what_changes_here: Shakespeare becomes an imperial language machine: stage, speech, legitimacy, and expansion begin to share one imaginative field.

routes.caveat: Literary spine orientation does not claim that literature alone drives history.
routes.what_changes_here: Homer becomes not only a historical source but a tool for inventing the human as a literary, moral, and political subject.

routes.caveat: Literary spine orientation does not claim that literature alone drives history.
routes.what_changes_here: Dante shifts from civilizational landmark to close-reading engine: the poem becomes a machine for sorting desire, guilt, punishment, and ascent.

routes.caveat: Application routes provide public orientation only, not quotation-grade live operational analysis.
routes.what_changes_here: Geography becomes operational pressure: chokepoints, nuclear infrastructure, proxies, and platforms make strategic escalation legible.

routes.caveat: Application routes provide public orientation only, not quotation-grade live operational analysis.
routes.what_changes_here: Game theory turns the same historical grammar into an incentive field: shipping, energy, deterrence, and narrative become pressure variables.

routes.caveat: Routed Tolstoy endpoint via an Anna Karenina coda, not a dedicated Tolstoy lecture.
routes.what_changes_here: The Homer-to-Tolstoy literary spine receives its routed endpoint: Tolstoy enters as a modern coda through Anna Karenina while the chapter remains a Secret History application node.

routes.caveat: Application routes provide public orientation only, not quotation-grade live operational analysis.
routes.what_changes_here: Secret History turns infrastructure into symbolic pressure: finance, networks, nuclear power, and sacred geography become a contested system of meaning.
